name: cloudera
explanation: The Cloudera integration scrapes the Cloudera Manager REST API (e.g. `https://cluster1.cloudera.site/cluster_1/cdp-proxy-api/cm-api/v48`). The check requires `workload_username` and `workload_password` (CDP Workload credentials) at init_config level plus a per-instance `api_url` that includes the deployment-specific cluster slug and API version. None of this is recoverable from a generic network probe: the URL embeds tenant-specific paths and the API will not respond without the workload credential. Even the optional mTLS path needs a user-provisioned `cert_file`/`key_file`.
notes: Pattern D (spec-required credentials). Cloudera Manager REST API requires CDP workload auth and a tenant-specific URL path.
